caption: This is an outside view. In the foreground there are two men standing, smiling and giving pose for the picture. The man who is on the right side is wearing a white color jacket and cap on the head, another man is wearing a suit. In the background there are many cars on the roads and also there are many trees and houses. On the left side there is a pole beside the road. On the right side there is a flag on the building. At the top of the image I can see the sky.
